mapper.select: SELECT * FROM address WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM address WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO address (user_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, address_detail, is_default) VALUES (#{userId}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{addressDetail}, #{isDefault})
mapper.update: UPDATE address SET receiver_name=#{receiverName}, receiver_phone=#{receiverPhone}, address_detail=#{addressDetail}, is_default=#{isDefault} WHERE address_id=#{addressId}
UPDATE address SET is_default = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
